config.description: Per signal-stack realised return distributions (n, median, P25/P75, win rate). Reads checked outcomes from DDB justhodl-signals; outputs data/magnitude-distributions.json. Institutional answer to 'how much will it pump?' — distributions, never point estimates.

schedule.description: Per-stack realised return distributions — daily 07:30 UTC, after outcome-checker + scorecard

config.description: Closed-loop opportunity-cost engine. Nightly scans every US stock with |daily move| >= 5%, checks DDB justhodl-signals for prior signals in 10d lookback, classifies misses (near_miss/wrong_signal_type/out_of_universe/regime_misfire). Outputs daily ledger + rolling 30d summary that feeds the calibrator.

schedule.description: Miss Detector — nightly 9PM ET (01:00 UTC). Post-market scan of every US mover ≥5% to find what we didn't catch.
